aliases.description: Aliases to add to the custom entity

authorIds.description: IDs of users to set as the custom entity's authors.

customFields.description: Custom fields to add to the custom entity. Every field should have its name as a key, mapping to an object with information about the value of the field.

fields.description: Schema fields to set on the custom entity. Must correspond with the schema's field definitions. Every field should have its name as a key, mapping to an object with information about the value of the field.

folderId.description: ID of the folder that the entity is moved into
